verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There stands a Rock on shores of time That rears to heav'n its head sublime; That Rock is cleft, and they are blest Who find within this cleft a rest.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some build their hopes on the ever drifting sand, Some on their fame, or their treasure, or their land; Mine's on a Rock that forever will stand, Jesus, the "Rock of Ages."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That Rock's a cross, its arms outspread, Celestial glory bathes its head; To its firm base my all I bring, And to the Rock of Ages cling.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: That Rock's a tow'r, whose lofty height, Illum'd with heav'n's unclouded light, Opes wide its gate beneath the dome Where saints find rest with Christ at home.
